title: 16 grape bunch personalities alternate
prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Image 1 locks Meg and Raul. Image 2 locks the world. Image 3 exactly locks the grape-bunch character material, faces, and cluster logic. BEAT — Playful alternate medium frame. Meg opens a grape Peelerz and a compact cluster of twelve round grape personalities unfolds in her hands. Three individual grapes pop free with tiny arms waving while the remaining nine cling together as a recognizable bunch. Raul's orange transformation glows softly behind her. Meg is delighted by the tiny social world rather than merely reacting. AVOID — one hooded familiar, loose realistic fruit, swarm filling frame, generic gummy bears, green apple, crowded row, horror faces.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic live-action Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage, contact sheet, or storyboard grid. Treat each attached image only according to its declared authority. Preserve Raul and Meg as the same teenagers, and preserve the established top-of-bleachers world, dusk light, clothing, and geography. Attached ingredient sheets are exact character or object design authorities; reproduce them faithfully rather than redesigning them from prose. Keep the surreal event localized and legible inside the live-action stadium. Candy remains tactile, translucent, appetizing, and benign. No anatomy, gore, generic gummy bears, captions, borders, watermarks, or invented package copy.
